title: Myth's Better Hotbar
description: Ever wanted a more clean look for your hotbar. Well look no farther then this Modrinth page. Axiom & ItemSwapper Support.
body:
### Updated Hotbar
![It looks better already](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/621cd077bc1f520fdebbf0a57bbb2d89be0f004e.png)

The vanilla hotbar wasn't updated in 1.14 by jappa with the texture update.
So I made this texture pack to hopefully fix that.

- Download from here or in the Modrinth launcher.
- Move this texturepack into the **resourcepacks** folder.
- Apply the pack on top of everything and enjoy the new hotbar.

### List of Supported Mods:
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [BackSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/backslot)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)

### Notes:
- _I **may add support** for other mods, but I am only supporting a few mods for now._
- _It **should** work with most mods, **unless they add their own textures** instead of using vanilla textures._
- _Unless there are changes on how resource packs structured I won't be updating, instead **I'll just mark the pack as compatible**._

### Terms of Use:
- _You **may not** redistribute / upload these textures in anyway shape or form. (Edited or Unedited)_
- _You **may** use this pack in videos or streams. (Credit would be appreciated, but it's not required)_
- _You **may** modify this pack for personal use._
